description.en: The China Building Materials Federation (CBMF) is the national industry association representing China's building materials sector, the world's largest producer of cement, flat glass, ceramics, and other construction materials. CBMF publishes authoritative monthly and annual statistics on cement production, flat glass output, ceramic tile production, stone industry output, and building materials prices. It tracks enterprise performance, capacity utilization, energy consumption, and environmental compliance for China's 400,000+ building materials enterprises. CBMF data is critical for construction industry analysis, real estate market research, and China's building materials export competitiveness assessment.
description.zh: 中国建筑材料联合会是代表中国建筑材料行业的全国性行业组织。中国是全球最大的水泥、平板玻璃、陶瓷和其他建筑材料生产国。联合会发布水泥产量、平板玻璃产量、陶瓷砖产量、石材行业产量及建材价格等权威月度和年度统计数据，追踪全国40余万家建材企业的经营绩效、产能利用率、能源消耗和环保合规情况，是建筑行业分析、房地产市场研究和中国建材出口竞争力评估的重要数据来源。

en: Cement production: monthly and annual output by province and enterprise, clinker production, and cement types breakdown
Flat glass output: production volume, specifications, and key manufacturers' data
Ceramic tile and sanitary ware: production statistics, export volumes, and major producing regions (Guangdong, Fujian, Shandong)
Stone industry data: natural stone mining, processing, and export statistics
Building materials prices: composite price indices for cement, glass, ceramics, and other key building materials
Enterprise performance: profitability, revenue, and operational data for major building materials enterprises
Energy and carbon metrics: energy consumption per unit output, CO2 emissions, and energy efficiency progress
Green building materials certification: certified green building materials products registry and standards
Annual China Building Materials Industry Development Report (中国建筑材料工业发展年度报告)
zh: 水泥产量：按省份和企业分类的月度和年度产量、熟料产量及水泥品种结构
平板玻璃产量：产量、规格及主要企业数据
陶瓷砖及卫生洁具：产量统计、出口量及主要产区（广东、福建、山东）数据
石材行业数据：天然石材开采、加工及出口统计
建材价格：水泥、玻璃、陶瓷及其他主要建材综合价格指数
企业绩效：主要建材企业盈利情况、营收及运营数据
能源与碳排放指标：单位产品能耗、二氧化碳排放量及能效提升进展
绿色建材认证：经认证的绿色建材产品名录及标准
中国建筑材料工业发展年度报告
